verdict_reason: Iter-2 P1s are closed: briefing.md scopes F10b click-through to evidence-id-keyed datums only, and test_inputs.md Block B now marks frame_coverage-derived frame_id datums as expected Phase-2B-PARTIAL no-ops rather than failures. No new P0/P1 issues found in scoped files.

post_halt_resolution.lowered_bar_summary: Phase-2B-PARTIAL-honest: F6 and F10 static-fixture surfaces are testable on HEAD; F13 replay and F14 real-corpus memory remain observational-only until Section G #3 cluster work; chart click-to-source is required only for datums whose evidence_id resolves through evidenceById, while frame_coverage-derived frame_id datums are expected no-ops.
